verify.title: Check your email
verify.body: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click it to continue your application. This page will advance automatically.

intent.title: What are you looking for?
intent.subtitle: A few quick questions so we can show you the right units.

checklist.title: Before you apply
checklist.subtitle: Here's what you'll need to finish your application.

items.income: Proof of income (last 2 pay stubs or offer letter)

fee.title: Application fee
fee.body: A $35.95 application fee is required to process your application. This covers credit and background checks.

rule120.title: 120-day rule
rule120.body: Your application stays active for 120 days. If we can't house you in that window, you'll be invited to refresh and continue.

pick.title: Pick your unit
pick.subtitle: Claiming a unit holds it for you for 48 hours while you finish your application.
pick.noMatch: No units match your preferences right now.

claim.finishBeforeTimer: Finish your application before the timer runs out to lock it in.
claim.noActive: No active claim — let's pick a unit.

details.title: Application details
details.ssnError: SSN must be XXX-XX-XXXX or 9 digits

review.title: Confirm what you're applying for
review.subtitle: Review the details before paying. You can edit any field.
review.confirmBody: Your application and fee are tied exactly to this property and unit type.

household.title: Who will live here?
household.subtitle: Your application fee (${{fee}} per adult 18+) reserves your spot on the waitlist.
household.adultsHint: Each must pay their fee and sign.
household.disclaimer: Fee is non-refundable. Your spot is locked when you pay.
